case_title: MATHEW J DOLAN et al VS. MARTIN BROOKS

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD FOR EXPUNGEMENT
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER DOLAN, MATHEW J JONES, IVAR N WHITE, DAVID W
NOTICE OF HEARING RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER DOLAN, MATHEW J JONES, IVAR N WHITE, DAVID W HEARING SET FOR MAR-21-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONERS MATHEW DOLAN, IVAR JONES & DAVID WHITE'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS OFF CALENDAR AS A DUPLICATE ENTRY. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PETITIONERS DAVID W. WHITE, MATTHEW J. DOLAN AND IVAR N. JONES AGAINST RESPONDENT MARTIN BROOKS (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
NOTICE OF HEARING RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER DOLAN, MATHEW J JONES, IVAR N WHITE, DAVID W HEARING SET FOR FEB-11-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONERS MATHEW DOLAN, IVAR JONES AND DAVID WHITE'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MARCH 21, 2013 TO GIVE PLAINTIFFS THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PLAINTIFFS MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 11, 2013, OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERs MATHEW DOLAN, IVAR JONES & DAVID WHITE's Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court will sign the proposed order submitted with the moving papers. Petitioner must prepare a separate proposed judgment. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-21-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERs MATHEW DOLAN, IVAR JONES & DAVID WHITE's Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is Off calendar as a duplicate entry. Judge: Marla J. Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-11-2013 Continued To Mar-21-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS MATHEW DOLAN, IVAR JONES and DAVID WHITE'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is Continued on the court's own motion to March 21, 2013 to give Plaintiffs the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiffs must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 11, 2013, or the motion will be denied. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported.
